news.title:
DOMS Industries acquires additional 6.5% stake in Pioneer Stationery.
Total shareholding rises to 64% after Rs 5.54 Cr transaction on March 31, 2026.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries acquires additional 6.5% stake in Pioneer Stationery.
Total shareholding rises to 64% after Rs 5.54 Cr transaction on March 31, 2026.

news.title:
DOMS Industries' subsidiary Uniclan Healthcare got a GST notice for FY 2021-22 alleging wrongful ITC of ₹5.22L.
A penalty and interest of ₹10.45L were also levied; the subsidiary plans a legal response.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries' subsidiary Uniclan Healthcare got a GST notice for FY 2021-22 alleging wrongful ITC of ₹5.22L.
A penalty and interest of ₹10.45L were also levied; the subsidiary plans a legal response.

news.title:
DOMS Industries Ltd has incorporated DOMS Foundation, a Section 8 company, on March 19, 2026.
DOMS Foundation will manage CSR activities for DOMS Group; DOMS Industries holds 80% control.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries Ltd has incorporated DOMS Foundation, a Section 8 company, on March 19, 2026.
DOMS Foundation will manage CSR activities for DOMS Group; DOMS Industries holds 80% control.

news.title:
DOMS Industries reported 307,381 shares sold at avg price of 2280.3.
Transaction executed by NK Securities Research Pvt Ltd.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries reported 307,381 shares sold at avg price of 2280.3.
Transaction executed by NK Securities Research Pvt Ltd.

news.title:
DOMS Industries aims for 18-20% revenue growth with Rs 250 crore CAPEX.
The company plans to launch a new JV by FY27.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries aims for 18-20% revenue growth with Rs 250 crore CAPEX.
The company plans to launch a new JV by FY27.

news.title:
DOMS Industries held an Investor Analyst Conference Call on Q3FY2026 results.
The audio recording of the call is available on the company's website.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries held an Investor Analyst Conference Call on Q3FY2026 results.
The audio recording of the call is available on the company's website.

news.title:
DOMS Industries' Q3 revenue grew 18.2%, 9M revenue rose 22.7%.
Exports surged 21.5% YoY; focus remains on domestic sales and capacity expansion.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries' Q3 revenue grew 18.2%, 9M revenue rose 22.7%.
Exports surged 21.5% YoY; focus remains on domestic sales and capacity expansion.

news.title:
Dom Industries plans an initial investment of up to ₹150M in a joint venture.
This move reflects its commitment to expanding business operations.
news.summary:
Dom Industries plans an initial investment of up to ₹150M in a joint venture.
This move reflects its commitment to expanding business operations.

news.title:
DOMS Industries approved Q3 FY26 results with standalone revenue of ₹511.1 cr.
525 shares allotted under ESOP 2023; JV with Seven SpA for backpacks formed.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries approved Q3 FY26 results with standalone revenue of ₹511.1 cr.
525 shares allotted under ESOP 2023; JV with Seven SpA for backpacks formed.

news.title:
DOMS Industries approved 137,690 new stock options under its 2023 ESOP plan.
Options priced at ₹250 each, vesting in 5-10 years, exercisable within 6 months.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries approved 137,690 new stock options under its 2023 ESOP plan.
Options priced at ₹250 each, vesting in 5-10 years, exercisable within 6 months.

news.title:
DOMS Industries schedules board meeting on Jan 30, 2026 to review unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months of 2025.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post financial results announcement as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries schedules board meeting on Jan 30, 2026 to review unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months of 2025.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post financial results announcement as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
DOMS Industries executed an NSE block trade of ~60,564 shares at Rs. 2671.7.
The total value of the transaction was Rs. 16.2 crores.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries executed an NSE block trade of ~60,564 shares at Rs. 2671.7.
The total value of the transaction was Rs. 16.2 crores.

news.title: Antique initiates 'Buy' on DOMS Industries with a target of Rs 3250.
news.summary: Antique initiates 'Buy' on DOMS Industries with a target of Rs 3250.

news.title:
DOMS Industries held an Investor Analyst Conference Call on Nov 11, 2025.
Audio recording of Q2FY26 results call uploaded on domsindia.com.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries held an Investor Analyst Conference Call on Nov 11, 2025.
Audio recording of Q2FY26 results call uploaded on domsindia.com.

news.title:
DOMS Industries reports 24.1% Q2 revenue growth, showcasing strong performance.
The company plans Rs.210-225 crore CAPEX by FY26 end for expansion.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries reports 24.1% Q2 revenue growth, showcasing strong performance.
The company plans Rs.210-225 crore CAPEX by FY26 end for expansion.

news.title:
Doms Industries Q2 net profit rose 13.5% to ₹58.3 Cr; revenue grew 24% to ₹567.9 Cr.
EBITDA increased 15.8% to ₹99.5 Cr; margin declined to 17.5% from 18.8% YoY.
news.summary:
Doms Industries Q2 net profit rose 13.5% to ₹58.3 Cr; revenue grew 24% to ₹567.9 Cr.
EBITDA increased 15.8% to ₹99.5 Cr; margin declined to 17.5% from 18.8% YoY.

news.title:
DOMS Industries will hold a board meeting on Nov 10, 2025, to approve unaudited Q2 and H1 FY2025 results.
Trading window for DOMS stock remains closed till 48 hours post-results declaration per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
DOMS Industries will hold a board meeting on Nov 10, 2025, to approve unaudited Q2 and H1 FY2025 results.
Trading window for DOMS stock remains closed till 48 hours post-results declaration per SEBI norms.
